info.title: TinyClaw API
info.description: HTTP API for the TinyClaw personal AI assistant.

put.summary: Configure the LLM provider and API key

delete.summary: Clear or delete a chat session
delete.description: Clears stored messages by default. Pass purge=true to delete the session record.

get.summary: List chat messages for a session

post.description: Returns JSON by default. Set stream=true, ?stream=true, or Accept: text/event-stream for SSE.

schema.description: SSE data lines with StreamEvent JSON payloads (chunk, tool_start, tool_end, done, error)

get.summary: List tools assigned to a profile

post.summary: Assign a tool to a profile

delete.summary: Unassign a tool from a profile

get.summary: Get soul status for a profile
Get soul stack contents for a profile

post.summary: Initialize soul templates for a profile
Draft an automation from a prompt
Draft an agent prompt from task title and description

profileId.description: Bot profile ID. Defaults to profile_default.

handlerConfig.description: JavaScript tool config, for example { "modulePath": "my-tool.js" } relative to ~/.tinyclaw/tools/.
